description: Amazon Q: Autonomous Syntax Audit and Refactoring Recommendation Gate.

code_audit.input: Recursive Audit: Scan the 'cli_coding_agents/' directory. Detect any Python SyntaxErrors (e.g., unterminated strings, indentation issues) or PEP8 violations. Generate a 'QA_AUDIT_REPORT.md' with specific remediation prompts for the Developer agent.
